content: getTokenAccountsByOwner(owner_pubkey, {programId: TOKEN_PROGRAM_ID}, {encoding: 'jsonParsed'}) response: value is an array of {pubkey, account:{data:{parsed:{info:{tokenAmount:{amount: string (raw units), decimals, uiAmount, uiAmountString}, mint, owner, state}}}}}. Read int(account.data.parsed.info.tokenAmount.amount) == 0 to classify an ATA as empty/closeable vs nonzero/leave-untouched.
